CapabilitySpec.description: Save an email attachment to a specified folder in the document store. Creates the folder if it does not exist. This is an external_mutation capability — the write is durable and requires rollback support.

message_id.description: Email message ID from which to extract the attachment.

attachment_index.description: Zero-based index of the attachment to save.

target_folder.description: Destination folder path. Created if it does not exist.

filename_override.description: Optional filename. If null, uses original attachment filename.

saved_path.description: Full path of the saved file.

checksum_sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of saved file. Used to verify rollback.
